rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be defined in the component implementation annex
generic_rules: Component ports referenced in AGREE contracts must be valid in the scope where the annex is placed
Preserve AADL architecture by placing AGREE elements in appropriate component type or implementation scopes
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require valid subcomponent and connection references
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without proper variable representation
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
